configurations.name: 默认配置
configurations.description: 自动创建的默认工具配置

tools.name: scene
tools.description: SCENE MANAGEMENT: Complete scene operations. IMPORTANT: NEVER directly edit .scene/.anim/.prefab files with text editors — always use MCP tools. Direct file editing causes broken UUID references and "资源导入失败" errors. Prefer db:// paths over UUIDs when referencing assets. Actions: get_info (current scene details), list (all project scenes), open (switch scene, requires scenePath), save (persist changes), create (new scene, requires sceneName+savePath), close (close scene), hierarchy (scene node tree, optional includeComponents), is_ready (check scene status), is_dirty (unsaved changes check), snapshot (save state), undo_begin/undo_end/undo_cancel (undo recording), execute_method (call component method), execute_script (run scene script), soft_reload (reload scene), query_mode (detect scene vs prefab-edit mode), validate_scene (check scene for broken references)

tools.name: node
tools.description: NODE OPERATIONS: Complete node management with smart path resolution. Accepts UUID, path (e.g. "Canvas/Panel/Button"), or name for all node parameters. Actions: find (search nodes, returns all matches with paths for duplicates), info (node details), list (all nodes), tree (hierarchy tree), create (new node, auto-adds UITransform under UI parents), delete, modify (set properties/transform), move (reparent), duplicate, copy, paste, cut, mount_script (attach script), remove_script (detach script), reset (reset properties/transform), detect_type (analyze node type)

tools.name: component
tools.description: COMPONENT OPERATIONS: Manage components on nodes. Accepts UUID, path, or name for node parameter. Actions: add (attach component), remove (detach component, use exact CID from list), list (all components on node), info (component details), set_property (set component property, auto-detects type if omitted), available_types (list all component types), click_event (configure button click events)

tools.name: prefab
tools.description: PREFAB OPERATIONS: Complete prefab management. Accepts UUID, path, or name for node/parent parameters. Actions: list (browse prefabs, optional folder), info (prefab details, requires prefabPath), validate (check integrity), create (convert node to prefab, requires node+prefabName+savePath), delete (remove prefab file), instantiate (create instance in scene, requires prefabPath+parent), unlink (break prefab connection), apply (save instance changes to prefab), revert (restore to prefab state), edit_enter (start editing), edit_save (save edits), edit_exit (return to scene), edit_test (test prefab)

tools.name: asset
tools.description: ASSET MANAGEMENT: Complete asset operations. Actions: query_info (asset details by path/UUID), search (find assets by type/folder), find_by_name (search by name pattern), details (deep asset info with sub-assets), create (new asset file), copy, move, delete, save (write content), reimport, import (from external), refresh (refresh asset DB), dependencies (analyze asset deps), manifest (export asset list), check_ready (DB ready check), query_path/query_uuid/query_url (path-UUID-URL conversions)

tools.name: editor
tools.description: EDITOR OPERATIONS: Project management, debugging, preferences, and server control. Actions grouped by domain: PROJECT: project_info, project_settings, run, build, build_settings, open_build_panel, builder_status, start_preview, stop_preview | DEBUG: console_logs, console_clear, log_read, log_search, log_info, mcp_log_read, mcp_log_clear, editor_info, performance | PREFERENCES: pref_open, pref_get, pref_set, pref_reset, pref_all, pref_categories, pref_search, pref_export | SERVER: server_ips, server_port, server_status, server_test, server_interfaces

tools.name: view
tools.description: SCENE VIEW & REFERENCE IMAGE: Viewport manipulation and reference images. GIZMO: gizmo_tool (change/query transform tool), gizmo_pivot, gizmo_coordinate | MODE: mode_2d_3d (switch 2D/3D), grid (set/query grid) | ICON: icon_3d_mode, icon_size | CAMERA: camera_focus (focus on nodes), camera_align_view, camera_align_node | STATUS: status, reset_view | REF IMAGE: ref_add, ref_remove, ref_switch, ref_clear, ref_config, ref_current, ref_list, ref_position, ref_scale, ref_opacity, ref_data, ref_refresh

tools.name: composite
tools.description: HIGH-LEVEL OPERATIONS: Create complete UI elements in one call. Actions: create_button (node+Sprite+Button+Label child), create_label (text node), create_image (image node with auto sprite), mount_and_bind (mount script + bind references), setup_widget (quick Widget alignment presets), batch (bulk create/clone nodes)

tools.name: knowledge
tools.description: COCOS CREATOR KNOWLEDGE BASE: Query component properties, UI design rules, layout patterns, widget strategies, and TOOL USAGE GUIDES. Topics: component_properties (precise property table from engine source), ui_design_rules (sizing/spacing/font guidelines), layout_patterns (dialog/list/tab/HUD node structures), widget_strategy (alignment presets and responsive tips), node_structure (specific UI component hierarchies), tool_guide (IMPORTANT: query before calling unfamiliar tools — returns precise param definitions, types, and examples. Use "tool.action" format e.g. "component.set_property")

tools.name: validate
tools.description: VALIDATION: Check scene for common issues. Actions: layout (button size, font size, empty Sprite checks), references (find broken node/asset refs), hierarchy (deep nesting, too many children warnings)

tools.name: template
tools.description: UI TEMPLATES: Apply pre-built UI structure templates. Actions: list (show available templates), apply (create template structure under parent node). Templates: dialog, scroll_list, nav_bar, settings_page

tools.name: capture
tools.description: SCENE SNAPSHOT: Get structured JSON layout of the current scene or a specific node subtree. Actions: scene_snapshot (full scene hierarchy with positions, sizes, widget, camera, resolution), node_snapshot (focused subtree with full component details — handles duplicate names via UUID/path)

tools.name: builder
tools.description: BUILD SCENE FROM JSON: Pass a node tree JSON to create complete hierarchies with components and properties in one call. Use cocos_knowledge(topic:"tool_guide", query:"builder.build") for JSON format and component reference.

tools.name: animation
tools.description: ANIMATION EDITING: Complete animation clip editing — playback, clip properties, keyframe CRUD, tracks, events, curves, batch, presets. Two write modes: (1) API mode (batch/preset) — requires Animation panel open and edit mode active; (2) File mode (batch_file) — writes .anim file directly, NO edit mode needed. Recommended workflow: try batch_file first, fall back to batch if file write fails. Supports "preset"/"preset_list" for one-call common animations.
